recommendations.title: A.R.O.G
recommendations.overview: Commander Logar fools Arif and sends him 1.000.000 years back in the time. He must civilize people from past to reach today.

recommendations.title: Comidark Films: In Between
recommendations.overview: Working in a ferry as a waiter, Ayzek, having a defect with his front teeth, dreams to get his front teeth fixed and to marry his girlfriend, Songül. The news gets out that the ferry company is turning over the management to a new one and the whole c

recommendations.title: The Magician
recommendations.overview: Failed magician Iskender decides to do a tour to save his career, but has to bring his grumpy and senile father along. The tour is quite unexpectedly interrupted when a bride actually disappears from the stage.

recommendations.title: Coming Soon
recommendations.overview: Pirated DVD seller Zafer who is formerly an extra in movies, swore to give up illegal works when his wife wanted to get divorce. To win his family back, he and his old-fashioned crew decided to make a movie called "Summit - The End Of Evil" which is

recommendations.title: CM101MMXI Fundamentals
recommendations.overview: The funny little details of everyday life,  simple things that make us laugh.  An unforgettable performance from Cem Yilmaz.  Yilmaz captures the audience with his hilarious stories about relationships, humankind's struggle with the technology and pr

recommendations.title: Dungeons & Dragons: Honor Among Thieves
recommendations.overview: A charming thief and a band of unlikely adventurers undertake an epic heist to retrieve a lost relic, but things go dangerously awry when they run afoul of the wrong people.

recommendations.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
recommendations.overview: Clark Griswold is on a quest to take his family to the Walley World theme park for a vacation, but things don't go exactly as planned.

recommendations.title: Snack Shack
recommendations.overview: Inseparable best friends AJ and Moose decide to run the local pool's snack shack after their plan to sell home-brewed beer goes down the drain. Things take a turn when they meet Brooke, an effortlessly cool lifeguard who puts their big plans, and fri

recommendations.title: Cloudy Mountain
recommendations.overview: The opening of the new tunnel, which took ten years to build, coincided with a series of serious cataclysms. The lives of 160,000 people depend on the actions of two people, a father and a son.

recommendations.title: Gnome Alone
recommendations.overview: When Chloe discovers that her new home's garden gnomes are not what they seem, she must decide between the pursuit of a desired high school life and taking up the fight against the Troggs.
